name: Courtney Giauque
focus: Research operations • Strategic planning • Financial management
bio: Courtney Giauque is a finance and operations professional at Northern Arizona University with a strong background in strategic planning and organizational management. She currently serves in a leadership role supporting research initiatives within the university, where she helps drive operational efficiency and support interdisciplinary programs. With experience in financial management and process improvement, she has built a reputation for advancing institutional goals through effective resource coordination and strategic execution. Courtney’s work focuses on enhancing organizational performance and supporting academic and research excellence. She holds a degree from Arizona State University and brings a results-driven approach to her role in higher education administration.
